name: parser: single-line 'May Ndlovu 3 Aug 2026' (name + ONE date) still re-prompts with zero writes (F20)
comment: The incomplete-input guard for the single-line path, and the mutation target for the under-detection direction. Only one real date token is present, so check-out is missing and the booking must NOT be created — re-prompt with zero writes, exactly as the newline name+one-date case (fixture 29) does. If date detection is broken so it stops finding the real date, or so it fabricates a second date from the name/year, this fixture flips (either it books wrongly, or it changes what it re-prompts on).

includes: Sorry, I didn't quite get that
